Document:
# Hitman
[color=#999999][italic]"Mission Started."[/italic][/color]
You're a [color=yellow]Criminal[/color], who takes money to kill people. [color=cyan]Your client wants you to kill them in a very particular way.[/color] Pay attention to your conditions.
##Teach your target a lesson Your client wants that your client dies once [color=red][italic]by your hand following their specifications.[/italic][/color] - [bold]They need not stay dead. Your client only cares that they die once, not for how long they are dead.[/bold] - [bold]This is your one task, take the time needed to plan it out.[/bold]
##Kill the target nicely Your client wants you to be respectful and courteous to your target. - Interrupting your target well they are doing something is rather rude. - Killing someone without even telling them you will or giving them time to talk is also very rude.
##Kill the target theatrically Your client wants to make this murder dramatic in a story telling sense. - You may need to interact with your target socially to set up the correct narrative tension, but remember you need a reason to be talking with them to not seem suspicious. - The best tragedies involve a fault of their victims. Knowing what kind of person your target is could help.
##Kill the target humorously Your client wants to make your target's death a joke. - Absurd methods of death are funny. Look into what doesn't seem like it could kill but can. - The station and clown has a lot of silly items. Searching maintenance tunnels and the clown's room may get you something useful.
##Kill the target cleanly Your client doesnt want the target's death to make a mess or otherwise look bad. - Any forms of damage which are internal will be very useful here. - Many smaller wounds will look more messy than 1 or 2 big wounds. - Death via fire will likely be very messy.
##Make your target's death look like a accident. Your client wants your target's death to not look like a murder. - Using or faking regular dangers in their department can go a long way towards making people believe you. - If the body does not get reported as suspicious then its unlikely anyone will question it further.
##Kill your target indirectly. Your client doesn't want you anywhere near the body once it drops. They want you to find a remote way of killing them. - The remote signaller can be very usefull for setting up traps or timing kills. - Having a method to tell your target's location will likely be very usefull in telling when a trap need be sprung.
##Drag out your target's death. Your client wants your target to suffer. They ask to make their death take a long one. - Healing supplies could be usefull in ensuring they survive longer than usual. - By the nature of this, you likely want to make your method quiet or kill them in a place no one will look for them.
##Kill your target in a public space. Your client wants to send a message by having them die where everyone will see. - Having a method to hide your idenity will be very useful when you need to do this in front of witnesses. - Using something to cause panic can be useful in giving you an opening.
##Inform your target they are a target. Your client wants you to inform the target they will be assassinated [color=red][bold]long before it happens.[/bold][/color] - Doing this will almost always put you under suspicion. Find a method to hide your identity or inform them indirectly. - Doing this early on could make your target grow compliant.
##Kill someone close to your target and make sure they know. Your client wants to mentally harm your target by killing someone close to them. - The person you kill has to be found out to be dead by your target. This cannot be a silent or permanent kill. - You'll need to interact with and stalk your target to figure out who is close to them. - There's no modifiers on killing the person close to them.
##Spend a long amount of time gaining the trust of your target. Your client wants your target to feel betrayed when you kill them. Spend a lot of time hanging out with them. - You will likely need to get into the same department as your target.
